fields.name: Basic Plan
fields.description: Perfect for beginners starting their fitness journey

fields.name: Pro Plan
fields.description: Best for regular gym-goers wanting advanced guidance

fields.name: Premium Plan
fields.description: Ultimate experience with personal trainer and custom plans

fields.name: Beginner
fields.description: Perfect for those new to fitness. Focus on form and consistency.

fields.name: Intermediate
fields.description: For those with some fitness experience. Increase intensity.

fields.name: Advanced
fields.description: Challenging workouts for experienced athletes.

fields.name: Bodyweight Squats
fields.description: Basic squat using body weight. Great for legs and glutes.
fields.instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower hips back and down. Keep chest up. Return to starting position.
fields.tips: Keep your back straight and knees behind toes.

fields.name: Push-Ups
fields.description: Classic upper body exercise targeting chest, shoulders, and triceps.
fields.instructions: Start in plank position. Lower body until chest nearly touches floor. Push back up.
fields.tips: Keep body straight. Modify with knee push-ups if needed.

fields.name: Walking Lunges
fields.description: Dynamic leg exercise for strength and balance.
fields.instructions: Step forward with one leg. Lower hips until both knees bent. Push off to step forward.
fields.tips: Keep front knee behind toes. Maintain upright posture.

fields.name: Plank
fields.description: Core strengthening exercise.
fields.instructions: Hold push-up position with elbows on ground. Keep body straight.
fields.tips: Squeeze glutes and core. Don't let hips sag.

fields.name: Jumping Jacks
fields.description: Cardio exercise to get heart rate up.
fields.instructions: Jump feet out and arms up simultaneously. Jump back to start.
fields.tips: Land softly on balls of feet.

fields.name: Pull-Ups
fields.description: Advanced back and bicep exercise.
fields.instructions: Hang from bar. Pull chest to bar. Lower with control.
fields.tips: Use resistance bands if needed. Focus on form.

fields.name: Dumbbell Rows
fields.description: Strength exercise for back muscles.
fields.instructions: Place knee and hand on bench. Pull weight to chest. Lower slowly.
fields.tips: Keep back flat. Squeeze shoulder blade.

fields.name: Burpees
fields.description: Full body cardio and strength exercise.
fields.instructions: Drop to squat. Kick feet back. Do push-up. Jump up.

fields.name: Mountain Climbers
fields.description: Dynamic core and cardio exercise.
fields.instructions: Start in plank. Drive knees toward chest alternately.
fields.tips: Keep hips down. Move quickly but controlled.

fields.name: Dips
fields.description: Triceps and chest exercise.
fields.instructions: Support body on bars. Lower body until elbows 90 degrees. Push up.
fields.tips: Keep shoulders down. Don't lock elbows.

fields.name: Deadlifts
fields.description: Compound exercise for posterior chain.
fields.instructions: Hinge at hips. Keep back flat. Drive through heels.
fields.tips: Keep bar close to body. Engage lats.

fields.name: Handstand Push-Ups
fields.description: Advanced shoulder and triceps exercise.
fields.instructions: Kick up to handstand. Lower head to ground. Push back up.
fields.tips: Use wall for support. Progress slowly.

fields.name: Pistol Squats
fields.description: Single-leg squat for balance and strength.
fields.instructions: Stand on one leg. Squat while other leg extends forward.
fields.tips: Use box for support. Focus on balance.

fields.name: Muscle-Ups
fields.description: Advanced pull-up and dip combination.
fields.instructions: Explosive pull-up to transition above bar. Press out to dip.
fields.tips: Use false grip. Generate momentum from hips.

fields.name: Planche Push-ups
fields.description: Advanced calisthenics exercise for upper body strength

fields.name: Front Lever
fields.description: Advanced calisthenics hold exercise

fields.name: Back Lever
fields.description: Advanced calisthenics hold exercise

fields.name: L-Sit
fields.description: Core strengthening isometric hold

fields.name: Human Flag
fields.description: Advanced full body strength exercise

fields.name: Dragon Flag
fields.description: Advanced core exercise

fields.name: One Arm Pull-up
fields.description: Advanced pull-up variation

fields.name: Barbell Bench Press
fields.description: Compound chest exercise

fields.name: Overhead Press
fields.description: Compound shoulder exercise

fields.name: Barbell Row
fields.description: Compound back exercise

fields.name: Romanian Deadlift
fields.description: Hamstring and glute exercise

fields.name: Hip Thrust
fields.description: Glute activation exercise

fields.name: Box Jumps
fields.description: Plyometric cardio exercise

fields.name: Kettlebell Swings
fields.description: Full body cardio exercise

fields.name: Battle Ropes
fields.description: High intensity cardio exercise

fields.name: Russian Twists
fields.description: Oblique targeting core exercise

fields.name: V-Ups
fields.description: Upper and lower core exercise

fields.name: Flutter Kicks
fields.description: Lower core strengthening

fields.name: Weight Loss
fields.description: Low calorie, high nutrition meals for effective weight loss

fields.name: Weight Gain
fields.description: Calorie-dense meals for healthy weight gain

fields.name: Muscle Building
fields.description: High protein meals for muscle growth

fields.name: Maintenance
fields.description: Balanced meals for maintaining healthy weight

fields.name: Oatmeal with Berries
fields.description: Healthy oatmeal topped with fresh berries
fields.ingredients:
1 cup rolled oats
2 cups water or milk
1/2 cup mixed berries
1 tbsp honey
1 tbsp chia seeds
fields.instructions: Cook oats in water/milk for 5 minutes. Top with berries, honey, and chia seeds.

fields.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
fields.description: Protein-rich yogurt with granola and fruits
fields.ingredients:
1 cup Greek yogurt
1/2 cup granola
1/2 cup mixed berries
1 tbsp honey
fields.instructions: Layer yogurt, granola, and berries in a glass. Drizzle with honey.

fields.name: Protein Smoothie Bowl
fields.description: Delicious protein-packed smoothie bowl
fields.ingredients:
1 scoop protein powder
1 banana
1 cup spinach
1 cup almond milk
1 tbsp peanut butter
Toppings: granola, chia seeds, coconut flakes
fields.instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Pour into bowl and add toppings.

fields.name: Egg White Omelette
fields.description: Low-calorie high-protein egg white omelette
fields.ingredients:
4 egg whites
1/4 cup chopped spinach
1/4 cup mushrooms
1/4 cup onions
Salt and pepper to taste
fields.instructions: Sauté vegetables. Add egg whites and cook until set. Fold and serve.

fields.name: Grilled Chicken Salad
fields.description: Fresh salad with grilled chicken breast
fields.ingredients:
150g grilled chicken breast
Mixed greens
Cherry tomatoes
Cucumber
1 tbsp olive oil
Lemon juice
fields.instructions: Grill chicken breast. Combine with fresh vegetables. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

fields.name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
fields.description: Nutrient-dense bowl with quinoa and roasted vegetables
fields.ingredients:
1 cup cooked quinoa
Roasted sweet potatoes
Roasted broccoli
Avocado
Tahini dressing
fields.instructions: Cook quinoa. Roast vegetables. Assemble bowl and drizzle with dressing.

fields.name: Salmon with Brown Rice
fields.description: Omega-3 rich salmon with healthy brown rice
fields.ingredients:
150g salmon fillet
1 cup brown rice
Steamed asparagus
Lemon butter sauce
fields.instructions: Pan-sear or bake salmon. Cook brown rice. Steam asparagus. Serve together.

fields.name: Lean Turkey Meatballs
fields.description: High-protein turkey meatballs with zucchini noodles
fields.ingredients:
150g lean ground turkey
Garlic
Herbs
Zucchini noodles
Marinara sauce
fields.instructions: Form turkey into meatballs. Bake or pan-cook. Spiralize zucchini. Serve with marinara.

fields.name: Tofu Stir Fry
fields.description: Plant-based protein stir fry with vegetables
fields.ingredients:
200g firm tofu
Mixed bell peppers
Broccoli
Carrots
Soy sauce
Ginger and garlic
fields.instructions: Press and cube tofu. Stir-fry with vegetables. Add sauce and cook until coated.

fields.name: Chicken Stir Fry
fields.description: Quick and healthy chicken stir fry
fields.ingredients:
150g chicken breast
Mixed vegetables
Soy sauce
Ginger
Garlic
fields.instructions: Slice chicken thinly. Stir-fry with vegetables. Add sauce and cook through.

fields.name: Apple with Peanut Butter
fields.description: Simple and satisfying snack
fields.instructions: Slice apple. Serve with peanut butter for dipping.

fields.name: Protein Shake
fields.description: Quick protein boost
fields.ingredients:
1 scoop protein powder
1 cup water or almond milk
fields.instructions: Mix protein powder with liquid. Shake well.

fields.name: Greek Yogurt
fields.description: High-protein yogurt snack
fields.ingredients:
1 cup Greek yogurt
Optional: honey or berries
fields.instructions: Enjoy plain or with toppings.

fields.bio: Certified strength and conditioning specialist with over 10 years of experience.
fields.qualifications: CSCS, NASM Certified, Sports Nutrition Certificate

fields.bio: Weight loss specialist with a focus on sustainable lifestyle changes.
fields.qualifications: ACE Certified, Nutrition Coach, Wellness Specialist

fields.bio: Bodybuilding coach specializing in muscle hypertrophy and physique transformation.
fields.qualifications: ISSA Certified, Bodybuilding Coach, Nutrition Expert

fields.bio: Yoga instructor specializing in flexibility, mindfulness, and injury recovery.
Clinical nutritionist helping clients achieve their health goals.

Sydney Sweeny is a certified yoga and wellness instructor with over 8 years of experience. She specializes in Vinyasa flow, Hatha yoga, and mindfulness meditation, helping clients achieve mental clarity and physical flexibility.
fields.qualifications: RYT 500 Certified, Yoga Therapy Certification, Mindfulness Coach
fields.achievements: Featured in Yoga Journal, 1000+ sessions completed, 5-star rated trainer
